steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank follows Organization, the final word of the noun phrase “the International Criminal Police Organization” that renames Interpol. An opening dash precedes this appositive phrase, and after the blank comes in 1961, a time expression.

steps.title: Apply the appositive closure rule
steps.content:
When a dash opens an appositive, a matching dash must close it. Organization— provides the necessary closing punctuation to complete the parenthetical structure.

The colon, comma, and no punctuation all fail to match the opening dash or create inconsistent punctuation marks.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
